title: pterocypsela laciniata
intro: Pterocypsela laciniata, also known as the laciniated pterocypsela, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant's roots and leaves are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering various health benefits such as reducing pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water, or used in herbal preparations such as capsules or tinctures.
